creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
update for the Port mail/mailgraph to new verson 1.13,

Fix: PORTNAME=      mailgraph
-PORTVERSION=   1.12
-PORTREVISION=  1
+PORTVERSION=   1.13
+#PORTREVISION= 1
 CATEGORIES=    mail
-MASTER_SITES=  http://people.ee.ethz.ch/~dws/software/mailgraph/pub/ \
-               http://people.ee.ethz.ch/~dws/software/mailgraph/pub/old/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://mailgraph.schweikert.ch/pub/

 MAINTAINER=    rafan@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       A RRDtool frontend for Postfix statistics


-WWW: http://people.ee.ethz.ch/~dws/software/mailgraph/
+WWW: http://mailgraph.schweikert.ch/--sFYI8EZamnCqZRDdSy0ulmCiQLKhbVgRbKmhKatDn9ArP87N
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -Nru mailgraph.1.12/Makefile mailgraph/Makefile
--- mailgraph.1.12/Makefile     Sun Aug 13 12:15:16 2006
+++ mailgraph/Makefile  Mon Apr 16 10:16:41 2007
@@ -6,11 +6,10 @@
 #
